input_dict.agent_role: Summarize first-hop evidence and expose the bridge entity, missing fact, or retrieval direction needed for the next hop.

task_context.question: Who wrote the debut song on the debut album of the artist who also released the album "I'm Still Here"?
task_context.agent_role: Summarize first-hop evidence and expose the bridge entity, missing fact, or retrieval direction needed for the next hop.

visible_agent_inputs.question: Who wrote the debut song on the debut album of the artist who also released the album "I'm Still Here"?
passages: Cold (But I'm Still Here) | "Cold (But I'm Still Here)" is the first single off Evans Blue's debut album, "The Melody and the Energetic Nature of Volume".  The song was released December 13, 2005, two months prior to the album release, and garnered frequent radio play in anticipation of the upcoming album.  Evans Blue's official MySpace explains the meaning of this song as well as others by the group.  A music video was also produced for "Cold (But I'm Still Here)."  The song currently has over three million plays on MySpace.

Kick Back Relax | "Kick Back Relax" is a pop song recorded by Swedish singer and Idol winner Agnes taken from her second album "Stronger".  The track was written by Jörgen Elofsson who also wrote her debut single "Right Here Right Now".  It was released as the album's first single in September 2006.

Crazy Over You | "Crazy Over You" is a debut song recorded by American country music duo Foster & Lloyd, who also wrote the song.  It was released in May 1987 as the first single from their self-titled debut album.  It was their most successful single, peaking at #4 on the "Billboard" Hot Country Songs chart in 1987.  The song was simultaneously recorded and released by Ricky Van Shelton on his debut album, "Wild-Eyed Dream".

Outta Here (song) | "Outta Here" is the title song of the debut studio album by Dutch R&B singer-songwriter Esmée Denters.  It was released as the debut single both from the artist and the album in the Netherlands on 14 April 2009, 27 April in New Zealand followed by 16 August in the UK.

Gabriela (singer) | Her self-titled debut album was released in 2001; it was produced by Vehnee Saturno, who also wrote eight of the album's ten songs.  Another of the songs was a rendition of Bryan Adams's "Please Forgive Me".  Her second album, "In the Interim", was released in 2004.

Anywhere but Here (song) | "Anywhere but Here" is the title of the fourth single released by American country music artist Sammy Kershaw.  It was co-written by Bob DiPiero and John Scott Sherrill with Buddy Cannon, who also produced it.  It was released in September 1992 as the final single from his debut album, "Don't Go Near the Water".  It peaked at #10 on the "Billboard" Hot Country Songs chart and #17 on the Canadian "RPM" country singles chart.

Dollhouse (Melanie Martinez song) | "Dollhouse" is the debut single by American recording artist Melanie Martinez.  The song was featured on Martinez's debut EP "Dollhouse" (2014), where it was released as the EP's lead single on February 9, 2014.  "Dollhouse" was later featured on Martinez's debut studio album, "Cry Baby" (2015).  Lyrically, "Dollhouse" is about a dysfunctional family, who, according to Martinez, is "hiding being a perfect plastic facade".  Martinez has also stated that "Dollhouse" is a metaphor for how people view celebrities and their seemingly perfect public lives.  Dollhouse is also the second song of Cry Baby, and this song is also the first official song Melanie Martinez wrote.

source_state.generated_query:
1) Find the artist:
"I'm Still Here" album "I'm Still Here" album "released" "album" discography

or more targeted:
""I'm Still Here" album" "released" "album title" "discography" "album 'I'm Still Here'"

2) After identifying the artist (replace ARTIST below with the artist name), find the debut song and writer:
ARTIST "debut album" track listing "tracklist" "debut" "written by" OR "written" OR "songwriter"

Example (if artist were X):
"X" "debut album" "track listing" "written by" "songwriter"

Use the above in sequence: first run query 1 to determine the artist who released the album "I'm Still Here", then run query 2 with that artist name to find who wrote the debut song on that artist's debut album.

target_state.output: Summary of first-hop evidence: The retrieved passages include multiple debut singles and some songwriter attributions but none connect an artist to an album titled "I'm Still Here." Relevant snippets: "Crazy Over You" — debut song by Foster & Lloyd (they wrote it); "Kick Back Relax" — notes Jörgen Elofsson wrote Agnes's debut single "Right Here Right Now"; "Dollhouse" — Melanie Martinez's debut single and is described as the first official song Martinez wrote; "Outta Here" — Esmée Denters' debut single (no songwriter given here); "Cold (But I'm Still Here)" contains the phrase but is the first single from Evans Blue's debut album "The Melody and the Energetic Nature of Volume" (so it is not an album titled "I'm Still Here"); other results mention debut albums or writers but do not tie any artist to an album called "I'm Still Here." Bridge / missing evidence needed: Identify which artist released the album titled "I'm Still Here," then open that artist's debut-album page and the debut-song page (or the debut-song entry) to find the songwriter. Compact retrieval direction for the next hop: retrieve the artist/album page for the album "I'm Still Here" (artist page for the performer who released that album) and the debut-song page from that artist. Candidate retrieval targets provided at this boundary: the pages "Mindy McCready" and "Ten Thousand Angels (song)". Do not resolve the songwriter here—fetch those pages next to locate the debut album and the writer of its debut song.
target_state.generated_query:
1) Retrieve the "Mindy McCready" page (artist biography/ discography). From that page, confirm the album titled "I'm Still Here", identify her debut album and its debut single, and capture references to the debut single's songwriter(s).

2) Retrieve the "Ten Thousand Angels (song)" page (or reliable source covering the song). From that page, extract the songwriting credit(s) and confirm it is the debut single from the debut album.
retrieved_titles: Guys Do It All the Time

target_state.answer: Billy Henderson and Steven Dale Jones
